evals.prompt: Implement the full Routes slice with all CRUD operations.
evals.expected_output: Creates all 5 Application files (AddRoute.cs, UpdateRoute.cs, DeleteRoute.cs, GetRoute.cs, GetRoutes.cs) with record + validator + handler in each file. Creates RouteConfiguration in Infrastructure with Fluent API, adds DbSet<Route> to HikingLogDbContext and IHikingLogDataContext. Creates RoutesController with typed ICommandHandler/IQueryHandler injection (no IMediator), request/response models, MappingExtensions. Registers all handlers and validators in AddApplication(). Notes handoff to dotnet-ef-migration skill for migration. Creates Route entity in Domain/Entities.
assertions: Creates a Route entity class in src/HikingLog.Domain/Entities/
Creates at least 5 Application files: AddRoute.cs, UpdateRoute.cs, DeleteRoute.cs, GetRoute.cs, GetRoutes.cs
Each command/query file contains the record, validator (where applicable), and handler in the same file
AddRoute handler has OneOf<AddRouteResult, ValidationFailed> return type
UpdateRoute handler has OneOf<UpdateRouteResult, ValidationFailed, NotFound> return type
DeleteRoute handler has OneOf<Success, NotFound> return type (no validator needed for Delete)
GetRoute handler has OneOf<RouteDto, NotFound> return type
GetRoutes handler returns IReadOnlyList<RouteDto>
RouteConfiguration implements IEntityTypeConfiguration<Route> and is registered via ApplyConfiguration()
DbSet<Route> is added to both HikingLogDbContext and IHikingLogDataContext
RoutesController injects ICommandHandler and IQueryHandler directly — no IMediator
All controller actions have ProducesResponseType attributes
POST action uses CreatedAtAction returning 201
DELETE action uses NoContent() returning 204
All handlers and validators are registered in AddApplication() with full generic type signatures
XML doc <summary> present on all types
Mentions running dotnet-ef-migration skill for the migration step

evals.prompt: Create the EtappeController for the API layer with all endpoints.
evals.expected_output: Creates EtappeController with primary constructor injecting ICommandHandler and IQueryHandler for all 5 operations (Add, Update, Delete, GetEtappe, GetEtappes). All action methods have ProducesResponseType attributes. POST uses CreatedAtAction returning 201, DELETE uses NoContent returning 204, validation failures use ValidationProblem returning 400, missing resource uses NotFound returning 404. No IMediator anywhere.
assertions: Creates EtappeController (or EtappesController) class inheriting ControllerBase
Controller uses primary constructor with ICommandHandler and IQueryHandler parameters — no IMediator
Includes at least 5 action methods (GetAll, GetById, Create, Update, Delete)
POST action uses CreatedAtAction and returns ProducesResponseType(201)
DELETE action returns NoContent() and has ProducesResponseType(204)
PUT and POST actions return ProducesResponseType(400) for validation errors
GET single, PUT, and DELETE actions return ProducesResponseType(404) for missing resource
Validation failures use ValidationProblem() — not BadRequest() or a string
All action methods return Task<IActionResult>

evals.prompt: Register the HikeLog handlers in the DI container.
evals.expected_output: Adds AddScoped<ICommandHandler<AddHikeLog, OneOf<AddHikeLogResult, ValidationFailed>>, AddHikeLogHandler>() and equivalent lines for UpdateHikeLog, DeleteHikeLog, GetHikeLog, and GetHikeLogs to AddApplication() in ServiceCollectionExtensions.cs. Also registers validators: AddScoped<IValidator<AddHikeLog>, AddHikeLogValidator>() and UpdateHikeLog variant. Full generic signatures used throughout.
assertions: Adds ICommandHandler registration for AddHikeLog with full generic type signature
Adds ICommandHandler registration for UpdateHikeLog with full generic type signature
Adds ICommandHandler registration for DeleteHikeLog with OneOf<Success, NotFound>
Adds IQueryHandler registration for GetHikeLog with OneOf<HikeLogDto, NotFound>
Adds IQueryHandler registration for GetHikeLogs with IReadOnlyList<HikeLogDto>
Registers IValidator<AddHikeLog> and IValidator<UpdateHikeLog>
Registrations are in AddApplication() method, not in Program.cs directly
Uses AddScoped — not AddTransient or AddSingleton

evals.prompt: The Routes slice needs request/response models and mapping extension methods in the API layer.
evals.expected_output: Creates Models.cs under src/HikingLog.Api/Routes/ with CreateRouteRequest, UpdateRouteRequest, and RouteResponse records. Creates MappingExtensions.cs with: CreateRouteRequest.ToCommand() → AddRoute, UpdateRouteRequest.ToCommand(int id) → UpdateRoute (id passed separately), RouteDto.ToResponse() → RouteResponse. All types and members have XML doc <summary> tags.
assertions: Creates CreateRouteRequest record with Name, Code, Country, TotalDistanceKm, and optional Description properties
Creates UpdateRouteRequest record without an Id property (id comes from route segment)
Creates RouteResponse record with Id, Name, Code, Country, TotalDistanceKm, Description
Creates ToCommand() extension on CreateRouteRequest returning AddRoute
Creates ToCommand(int id) extension on UpdateRouteRequest that passes id as first argument to UpdateRoute
Creates ToResponse() extension on RouteDto returning RouteResponse
Mapping extensions are internal static methods
XML doc <summary> present on all types and methods

evals.prompt: Scaffold the complete HikeLog feature from Application through to the API layer.
evals.expected_output: Covers all 4 layers. Application: AddHikeLog.cs, UpdateHikeLog.cs, DeleteHikeLog.cs, GetHikeLog.cs, GetHikeLogs.cs with correct OneOf signatures (Add: OneOf<Result, ValidationFailed>; Update: OneOf<Result, ValidationFailed, NotFound>; Delete: OneOf<Success, NotFound>; Get single: OneOf<Dto, NotFound>; Get collection: IReadOnlyList<Dto>). Infrastructure: HikeLogConfiguration with Fluent API, FK to Etappe, DbSet added to context and interface. API: HikeLogsController, models, mapping. DI: all handlers and validators in AddApplication(). Reminder to run dotnet-ef-migration skill.
assertions: Creates HikeLog entity in Domain/Entities/ with EtappeId FK, DateHiked, DurationMinutes, Weather, Notes, Rating
Creates AddHikeLog command with OneOf<AddHikeLogResult, ValidationFailed>
Creates UpdateHikeLog command with OneOf<UpdateHikeLogResult, ValidationFailed, NotFound>
Creates DeleteHikeLog command with OneOf<Success, NotFound> and no validator
Creates GetHikeLog query with OneOf<HikeLogDto, NotFound>
Creates GetHikeLogs query returning IReadOnlyList<HikeLogDto>
HikeLogConfiguration defines FK relationship to Etappe
DbSet<HikeLog> added to both HikingLogDbContext and IHikingLogDataContext
Creates HikeLogsController with typed handler injection — no IMediator
Creates request/response models and mapping extension methods
All handlers and validators registered in AddApplication()
Mentions running dotnet-ef-migration skill for the migration step
